content.en:
"The three clans of reincarnation are ready to act, and before they act, they will break through the cultivation as soon as possible. Only when the strength has reached the seventh balance realm and has the invincible combat power of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords can they guarantee safety in the future!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Moreover, he had a hunch that after reaching the seventh balance realm, his strength would definitely increase even more than he imagined.

But it depends on the breakthrough.

Over the years, he has been preparing for the impact of the seventh balance, and a better three-source secret medicine, a large number of reincarnation realm breaking pills, and various resources have been prepared, just to break through the third balance realm.

"Then let's start breaking through!"

A copy of Ye Tian's body began to impact the seventh balance realm.

And this impact naturally needs to use the Supreme Dao rules, otherwise it is impossible for him to break the shackles.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian began to impact again and again, and in the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of primeval era years had passed.

At this time, his replica body was already riddled with holes, which was the result of multiple failed breakthroughs.

However, he also gained a lot of experience.

"Change to a replica body and continue to break through!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

His other replica bodies continued to break through, but still failed after that.

As time passed, he became more and more aware of the seventh balance, and the more he felt it, the hope of a breakthrough naturally increased.

this day.

Click!!

The bottleneck in the dark was torn apart, and Ye Tian successfully broke the shackles, and it was a perfect breakthrough, without affecting the body.

At this time, the Supreme Dao Rule shattered the bottleneck and absorbed the energy from the outside world and poured into the body.

Of course, the energy of the outside world is thin, and he uses all his resources to refine and assist him in breaking through.

The improvement obtained by this breakthrough was too great, Ye Tian's body was transforming every moment, his cultivation was getting higher and higher, and in the end, he also forcibly devoured the energy of the origin of the land on the other side of eternity.

The origin of the land on the other side of eternity is very weak, and if it is sucked by Ye Tian like this, it will be even weaker.

It was only after about five million years of the primeval era that Ye Tian's cultivation was officially stabilized.

"Finally broke through to the seventh balance realm!"

Ye Tian was excited.

His current strength is many times stronger than in the past, which is a qualitative improvement.

He can pinch his previous self to death with his own hands, which means that he can pinch to death a powerful Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord with his own hands.

This is the Nine Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord is invincible!

Of course, he should still not be able to compete with the existence above the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but there may be hope of saving his life.

"The three reincarnation clans are also about to start moving!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Deep in the origin of the reincarnation domain.

The Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Reincarnation Clan, who broke the boundaries of the Nine Times, are all here, ready to attract the powerhouses of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Origin Clan, and cooperate with the urging of that prison to break the prison array.

"Let's get started!"

Sideburns said.

Soon, a Origin Upper Realm Overlord received the news.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body was also one of them, standing at a node in the prison breaking formation, and after getting the news, he immediately urged the formation.

Rumble!!!!!

A Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord urged the prison to break the prison array, and the entire formation covered a huge area, and even brought many Origin Upper Realm Overlords into the origin of the reincarnation domain, gradually approaching the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain.

It didn't take long for this prison breaking array to come to the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain.

If your consciousness continues to zoom in and look at this prison breaking formation, you can see that this formation is like an awl, with terrifying penetrating power.

"Let's get started!"

Yazu and they shouted.

Rumble!!!!!

The prison breaking array began to urge with all its might, and the power of the formation turned into an incomparably large awl, instantly tearing apart the forbidden area deep in the origin of the reincarnation domain.

Click!

The forbidden area was torn apart, and the consciousness of many Origin Upper Realm Overlords also extended out with the prison breaking array.

Of course.

Their bodies were still in the origin of the Reincarnation Domain, and they didn't dare to really step into the forbidden area, otherwise they would have to face the existence beyond the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and it would be easy to fall.

They don't want to fall!

"It's broken!"

Yazu: They were excited.

Soon.

A large prison light curtain appeared in their perceptions.

The dense pillars of light formed a vast prison that covered the entire reincarnation domain and beyond.

This prison is so big that they can't perceive it all, only one corner.

And at this time, they also saw the reason for the disappearance of the origin of the reincarnation domain.

I saw that above the prison, there was an incomparably huge giant tree, and the roots of this giant tree had penetrated into it, absorbing the origin of the reincarnation domain.

And this giant tree is giving birth to a huge fruit.

At this moment, no matter how stupid Yazu is, they finally understand.

The disappearance of the origin is precisely to nurture this giant tree and let it bear fruit.

It's just that now that the fruit is about to be born, there are too many origins needed, so they frantically absorb the origin of the reincarnation domain and the land on the other side of eternity.

That's when it happened.

A figure appeared next to the giant tree, and the other party found the prison breaking array.

"Look for death!"

The other party made a move, and a big palm crushed him.

The power of this palm far surpassed that of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

And Ye Tian even sensed the power of the Supreme Dao Rules from it, which was even stronger than his Supreme Dao Rules.

In terms of strength, he is naturally not the opponent of this existence.

But.

With so many Origin Upper Realm overlords of the three clans of reincarnation, it is not without a little power to resist with the help of the prison prison array.

"Breaking the Prison !!"

Yazu: They yelled.

Bang!!!!!

An overlord of the Origin Upper Realm burned the bloodline, the origin, and urged the forbidden arts, urging the prison to break the prison formation at all costs.

The brilliant light tore through everything, and even more so the palm of that powerful being.

However.

Not only that, but the prison breaking array directly tore the prison apart.

Click!!!

The prison was broken through, and pieces of shards fell down, falling into the realm of reincarnation.

Buzz Buzz!!

Another figure appeared, armed with a weapon, and slashed towards the prison breaking array.

"A group of small bugs, dare to resist!"

Bang!!!

Under the attack of these two Origin Upper Realm Overlords, the Prison Breaking Array was directly broken, and the bodies of one Origin Upper Realm Overlord were cracked, and the weak Origin Upper Realm Overlord was directly killed.

In an instant, at least more than five thousand Origin Upper Realm Overlords fell.

And those powerhouses of the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords have borne most of the impacts, and they have also been hit hard one by one.

"Retreat!"

Yazu: They yelled.

They immediately came out of the origin of the reincarnation domain, and those two beings did not kill in, obviously they really couldn't enter, otherwise they would definitely not give up the pursuit and kill when they were so angry.
